import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(input, "\n")
mut total = 0
for line in lines
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
    match tokens.get(1)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        total = total + n
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
end
println("sum=#{total}")
